headline: Nebius Group (NasdaqGS:NBIS) Lands $2 Billion From Nvidia As Avride Moves With Uber
summary: Nvidia commits a direct US$2b investment to Nebius Group (NasdaqGS:NBIS) to support AI data center expansion. Nebius plans to scale its neocloud infrastructure with Nvidia hardware and software across its data center network. Avride, Nebius Group's autonomous vehicle subsidiary, emerges with a partnership with Uber targeting robotaxi and delivery robot markets. Nebius Group sits at the intersection of AI infrastructure and cloud computing, positioning its neocloud offering for workloads...
